title: Occasional machine terminated without reasons
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**
Podman v4.3.1

/kind bug

**Description**
This is the second time I experience this, podman machine just suddenly terminated and cannot be accessed. Below are what I'm currently experiencing:
`wsl machine start podman-fed`
The Windows Subsystem for Linux instance has terminated.
The Windows Subsystem for Linux instance has terminated.
Error: the WSL bootstrap script failed: exit status 0xffffffff

`podman machine list`
NAME        VM TYPE     CREATED      LAST UP       CPUS        MEMORY      DISK SIZE
podman-fed  wsl         2 weeks ago  31 hours ago  0           0B          18.69GB

List of my machine and it showed that my podman machine was down 31 hours ago, but I was still using it yesterday... which is weird


`
wsl -l -v
`
This will still return me the info that the wsl2 machine is still running:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/88610355/204928508-e5126c3e-9f1a-4457-b232-88d76adb0edb.png)


However, if I do wsl -d:
`wsl -d podman-fed`
The Windows Subsystem for Linux instance has terminated.


It showed that the Linux instance is terminated

`podman machine info`
Host:
  Arch: amd64
  CurrentMachine: ""
  DefaultMachine: ""
  EventsDir: C:\Users\wpham\.local\share\containers\podman\podman
  MachineConfigDir: C:\Users\wpham\.config\containers\podman\machine\wsl
  MachineImageDir: C:\Users\wpham\.local\share\containers\podman\machine\wsl
  MachineState: ""
  NumberOfMachines: 1
  OS: windows
  VMType: wsl
Version:
  APIVersion: 4.3.1
  Built: 1668089925
  BuiltTime: Fri Nov 11 01:18:45 2022
  GitCommit: 814b7b003cc630bf6ab188274706c383f9fb9915
  GoVersion: go1.18.5
  Os: windows
  OsArch: windows/amd64
  Version: 4.3.1

This is the info of podman which is v4.3.1

`podman machine inspect podman-fed`
[
     {
          "ConfigPath": {
               "Path": "C:\\Users\\wpham\\.config\\containers\\podman\\machine\\wsl\\podman-fed.json"
          },
          "ConnectionInfo": {
          },
          "Created": "2022-11-14T17:25:26.3319666+11:00",
          "Image": {
                    "Path": ""
               },
               "ImageStream": "35",
               "ImagePath": {
                    "Path": "C:\\Users\\wpham\\.local\\share\\containers\\podman\\machine\\wsl\\podman-fed_fedora-podman-v36.0.73.tar"
          },
          "LastUp": "2022-11-30T03:02:12.7821216+11:00",
          "Name": "podman-fed",
               "CPUs": 0,
               "DiskSize": 18690867200,
               "Memory": 0
          },
               "IdentityPath": "C:\\Users\\wpham\\.ssh\\podman-fed",
               "Port": 51113,
               "RemoteUsername": "user"
          },
     }
]

Above is the info of my machine when doing an inspect.

Note that this only happens occasionally, and every time, I have to create another machine. Any thoughts on why it's happening and how to fix it?

comments.body: This has been resolved after a restart
